news.summary: Indianapolis will be hosting a special event this Memorial Day Weekend in 2025, emphasizing the importance of saving lives alongside celebrating speed. ZERO Prostate Cancer (ZERO), recognized as the top advocacy and support group for prostate cancer in the nation, will be playing a significant role during this time. With a strong presence throughout the weekend, ZERO will be raising awareness for the cause and emphasizing the importance of early detection and treatment options.
news.headline: Indy 500 stars team up with ZERO Prostate Cancer to promote veterans' health during Memorial Day races.

news.summary: In Irving, Texas on May 23, 2025, Caris Life Sciences® unveiled that it has submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Caris is recognized as a top patient-focused AI TechBio firm and a trailblazer in precision medicine. This move showcases the company's commitment to growth and likely signals upcoming financial activities.
news.headline: Caris Life Sciences files for IPO, registering on Form S-1 with the SEC on May 23, 2025. Leading AI TechBio firm in precision medicine.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a new high of 7.5%, with a total of 10 million people currently out of work. This marks a significant increase from the previous quarter, where the rate was at 6.2%. The data also showed that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 15% compared to the same period last year. Additionally, the report highlighted that the youth unemployment rate stands at 12%, affecting around 2.5 million individuals in the 18-24 age group. Experts warn that the economic impact of the pandemic continues to take a toll on the labor market, with projections suggesting a further rise in unemployment rates in the coming months.
news.headline: S&P 500 drops with Trump's EU deal stance, latest market update.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 23, 2025, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) received notice of an unsolicited "mini-tender" bid from TRC Capital Corporation. The offer is to acquire a maximum of 2.0 million Class B subordinate voting shares of Teck, which is around 0.41 percent of the total outstanding Class B subordinate voting shares as of the mentioned date.
news.headline: Teck rejects TRC Capital's "mini-tender offer" to buy 2.0 million of its shares, representing 0.41% of total shares.

news.summary: In a recent acquisition deal, Shaklee, a leading player in the nutrition supplement sector, has successfully obtained a significant portion of Modere's business operations via a subsidiary. The agreement encompasses Modere's ownership of trademarks, patents, and formulas for numerous products. This strategic move signifies Shaklee's commitment to expanding its market presence and diversifying its product portfolio. The deal is set to bolster Shaklee's standing in the industry, with potential positive impacts on revenue and customer base. This acquisition marks a considerable development in the nutrition supplement market, with the total value of the deal estimated to be in the range of millions of dollars.
news.headline: Shaklee acquires Modere's business assets, including trademarks and patents, for wellness product expansion.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, 23 May 2025 - Mustang Energy Corp. is excited to announce the launch of its 2025 field exploration program at the 914W Project in a mineral-rich area south of the Athabasca Basin. The Project is known for its potential and the Company acquired an interest through an Option Agreement with Skyharbour Resources Ltd., with the opportunity to obtain a 75% stake by meeting specific criteria. Further information on the Option Agreement can be found in the news release dated November 13, 2024, available on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile. Mustang Energy Corp. trades under symbols CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA: 92T.
news.headline: Mustang Energy Corp. starts program at 914W Uranium Project in Alberta. Option agreement with Skyharbour for 75% interest.

news.summary: Minneapolis-based Proto Labs, Inc. (NYSE: PRLB), a prominent provider of digital manufacturing services, disclosed the granting of equity awards on May 23, 2025. The awards were given as a significant inducement to Suresh Krishna, the Company's newly appointed President and Chief Executive Officer, upon entering employment. Earlier, Proto Labs had finalized an executive employment agreement with Krishna in line with his appointment.
news.headline: Protolabs grants equity awards to new CEO, Suresh Krishna, under NYSE Rule 303A.08, on May 23, 2025.

news.summary: A non-profit organization called All Hands and Hearts (AHAH), which offers community-based disaster relief across the globe, proudly announced on May 23, 2025, that TIME magazine included AHAH co-founder Petra Nemcova in its prestigious 2025 TIME100 list.
news.headline: Petra Nemcova makes 2025 Time100 Philanthropy list, co-founder of AHAH, provides disaster relief globally.

news.summary: Logitech International (SIX: LOGN) (Nasdaq: LOGI) has recently filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for Fiscal Year 2025, which concluded on March 31, 2025, in compliance with the regulations set under Art. 53 LR. The report has been submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and can be accessed through Logitech's website at http://ir.logitech.com. Additionally, Logitech anticipates releasing its annual report to shareholders, along with the invitation and proxy statement for the upcoming period.
news.headline: Logitech filed Form 10-K for FY 2025, ended March 31, 2025, with SEC. Available on website. Publication of annual report and proxy statement to follow.

The movie, directed and written by Storay, has gained significant attention and positive reception. The success of the film on Tubi highlights its rising popularity among viewers.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, May 23, 2025 - Imperial Metals Corporation (TSX: III) has disclosed its Notice of Intention for a Normal Course Issuer Bid (the “Bid”) which has been accepted by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). The bid will be executed on the TSX or other Canadian trading systems.
news.headline: Imperial Metals Corp. has announced a Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSX (TSX:III) on May 23, 2025.

news.summary: Texas Governor Greg Abbott has shown support for a bill passed by the state House of Representatives to establish a strategic cryptocurrency reserve following the 2024 federal elections. The bill, SB 21, awaits Abbott's decision three months after its introduction. Abbott aims to position Texas as a "crypto capital" by 2024. New Hampshire and Arizona have already passed similar bills, while half of the 50 states are considering creating a Bitcoin reserve. At the federal level, President Trump's executive order for a "Strategic Bitcoin Reserve" has not been codified by Congress. Wyoming Senator Cynthia Lummis is pushing the BITCOIN Act. The Senate will possibly debate the GENIUS Act regulating payment stablecoins by Memorial Day. Adam Back believes that the Bitcoin price cycle will be significantly higher than $100K.
news.headline: Texas Governor Greg Abbott supports Bitcoin reserve bill passed by state House, aiming to establish a strategic crypto reserve. Abbott referred to himself as a “crypto law proposal supporter” in 2021 and suggested policies to make Texas a “crypto capital” by 2024. Several state govts proposing similar reserves post-2024 elections. New Hampshire Governor signed first Bitcoin reserve bill into law; Arizona Governor also supports unclaimed crypto bill. Wyoming Senator leading efforts in Congress. President Trump previously signed executive order for “Strategic Bitcoin Reserve” but not yet codified. Senate also considering GENIUS Act to regulate payment stablecoins. Notable crypto figure Adam Back predicts Bitcoin price surge beyond $100K.

news.summary: Japanese company Nippon Steel has finalized the acquisition of U.S. Steel after 17 months since the initial offer was made. This deal has garnered attention, particularly as it received approval from former President Trump. Following the announcement, stock prices for U.S. Steel soared, while other companies in the steel industry observed a decline.
news.headline: Nippon Steel acquiring U.S. Steel after 17 months, Trump approves. X stock soars while others sink.

news.summary: Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. based in Irvine, California, announced on May 23, 2025, that they signed a Non-Binding Offer (NBO) with a European Solar and Wind development company. The company, listed as (Nasdaq: CETY), specializes in offering turnkey energy solutions and leveraging advanced technologies to provide cost-effective and environmentally friendly green energy solutions, clean energy fuels, and alternative electricity. The European partner's identity remains confidential at this time due to undisclosed reasons.
news.headline: Clean Energy Technologies signs NBO with European Solar and Wind company, details undisclosed.

news.summary: Universal Corporation (NYSE:UVV), a worldwide agriproducts corporation, is set to conduct a conference call on May 29, 2025, subsequent to announcing its fiscal year 2025 results after the market closes on the same day. The conference call is scheduled to commence at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call on a listen-only basis at www.universalcorp.com. For those unable to join live, a replay of the webcast conference call will be accessible on the company's website.
news.headline: Universal Corporation (NYSE:UVV) to host conference call on May 29, 2025 after market close at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Webcast available at www.universalcorp.com.

news.summary: President Trump has given his approval to a deal that connects U.S. and Japanese steel makers, despite it being initially blocked due to national security concerns. The agreement involves a significant amount of steel trade between the two countries, emphasizing a positive change in the stance on the national security issue. The deal is expected to bring about a boost in the steel industry, with the particulars indicating a large-scale collaboration between the American and Japanese companies. Trump's backing of the deal signifies a shift in policy and an opportunity for increased economic cooperation between the nations involved.
news.headline: Trump announces US Steel to partner with Nippon Steel, despite previous national security concerns.

news.summary: During the 2025 season, the Supercross events saw the fourth highest attendance in history. The SMX League achieved a milestone by surpassing one billion minutes streamed on Peacock, a first-time accomplishment. The 17-round Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship, held in indoor stadiums, took place in PALA, Calif., on May 23, 2025.
news.headline: Cooper Webb becomes three-time Supercross champion. 2025 season drew fourth highest attendance with SMX League streaming over 1 billion minutes on Peacock.

news.summary: In California, on May 23, 2025, Trio Petroleum Corp (NYSE American: TPET), a California-based oil and gas company, has announced the suspension of operations at McCool Ranch. The company will also cease its efforts to acquire a working interest in the project due to the challenging economic conditions. The decision was primarily influenced by the natural gas prices and water disposal costs, especially in California, where McCool Ranch is situated, which have made it financially impractical for Trio to utilize cyclic-steam operations to boost production. As a result, the company will redirect its focus towards other potential sites that are expected to be more economically viable and potentially more profitable in the long term.
news.headline: Trio Petroleum Corp to suspend operations at McCool Ranch due to high costs, shift focus to more profitable sites.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, the California Department of Food and Agriculture (CDFA) and partners in federal and local government are cautioning millions of travelers during the Memorial Day weekend, marking the start of summer travel season, against carrying fruits, vegetables, or meat products that could propagate harmful pests, such as invasive fruit flies. The CDFA, along with U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), urge travelers not to pack these items, emphasizing the risk of spreading pests. This advisory aims to prevent the introduction of invasive species, safeguarding agriculture and ecosystems.
news.headline: CDFA and partners urge travelers not to pack fruits, veggies, or meat products to prevent pest spread.

During this period, the company reported a net loss of $119,150, equivalent to $0.00 per share. As of March 31, 2024, BULGOLD held cash and cash equivalents amounting to $252,891.

news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, on May 23, 2025, Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT), a prominent healthcare technology company, disclosed its upcoming involvement in Bernstein's 41st Strategic Decisions Conference set for Thursday, May 29, 2025. Geoff Martha, the chairman and chief executive of Medtronic, will be representing the company at the event.
news.headline: Medtronic CEO to speak at 41st Strategic Decisions Conference on May 29, 2025. Important event for healthcare industry.

news.summary: The latest data shows a surge in Covid-19 cases with over 10,000 new infections reported in the past 24 hours. Health officials are expressing concern as the total number of active cases has reached 50,000. The recent spike has led to a rise in hospitalizations, with more than 500 patients currently admitted for treatment. In response to this uptick, authorities are implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The vaccination campaign continues, with over 1 million doses administered so far. Despite these efforts, the situation remains critical, and the public is urged to adhere to health guidelines to prevent further escalation of the crisis.
news.headline: Nova Leap Health Corp. reveals outcomes of their annual and special shareholder meeting.
